title: [Python] Add Python builder for RTLModuleOp.
body:
This is done using MLIR's Python extension approach. This isn't
actually documented at the moment, but the gist is you can add to the
sugar class for a given operation by defining things in a well-known
module.

This particular extension is basically a copy of the builtin FuncOp
builder from upstream MLIR, with some RTLModuleOp flavored tweaks. It
is by no means the final state, but this is a decent starting point to
be able to build RTLModuleOps in a somewhat decent way from Python.

See the upstream extension for cross-reference:
https://github.com/llvm/llvm-project/blob/32f6a15dfd5221d5fb628f74ecfe72302af460f4/mlir/lib/Bindings/Python/mlir/dialects/_builtin_ops_ext.py#L25
